positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a whimsical forest creature (like a friendly otter or fox) sitting amidst stylized bioluminescent mushrooms and ferns. The style should be highly graphic, featuring thick black outlines and vibrant pops of color (teal, deep indigo, and lime green) on a clean, solid background. The composition must be centrally framed and scalable, emphasizing clean silhouettes and bold negative space, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Overhead studio lighting, high contrast, vector quality, flat graphic design, kawaii aesthetic, seamless composition elements.
